---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

### Apply Nexus Topology

```{r}
library(hydrofabric)
```

# not sure where to get the nextgen_file
```{r}
nextgen_file <- "hydrofabric/poudre.gpkg"
aggregated_file <- "vpu_01/vpu01_aggregate_distribution.gpkg"

```


```{r}
apply_nexus_topology(aggregated_file, export_gpkg = nextgen_file)
```
